title: Silicone Air Fryer Liner 1PC – 20cm Reusable Non-Stick Round Basket with Handles, Heat-Resistant & BPA-Free Accessory, Dishwasher Safe Food-Grade Replacement for Parchment Paper, Fits Ninja, Tower
features: Reusable & Eco-Friendly: This silicone air fryer liner replaces single-use parchment paper, helping you reduce waste while saving money — perfect for everyday healthy cooking.
Non-Stick & Easy to Clean: Food releases easily without residue, and cleanup takes seconds. Simply rinse or place it in the dishwasher for hassle-free maintenance.
Heat-Resistant & Safe Material: Made from premium food-grade silicone, this liner withstands temperatures up to 240°C (464°F), keeping your air fryer basket protected from grease and scratches.
Convenient Handles for Easy Removal: Built-in side handles let you safely lift hot food out of the fryer without burning your hands, offering better grip and comfort.
Universal Fit for Most Air Fryers: Designed to fit round air fryers of various sizes, this liner works great with popular models — ideal for cooking fries, chicken, pastries, and more.
description: Upgrade your air frying experience with this Reusable Silicone Air Fryer Liner , a durable, non-stick solution for cleaner, easier, and healthier cooking. Crafted from premium BPA-free food-grade silicone , it’s safe, flexible, and heat-resistant up to 240°C. Unlike disposable parchment paper, this liner can be washed and reused countless times, making it an eco-friendly choice for your kitchen. Its non-stick surface prevents food from sticking and keeps your air fryer basket clean, while the integrated handles allow safe removal of hot food. Suitable for most standard round air fryers, it’s ideal for preparing crispy fries, juicy chicken, or even baked treats without any mess. Dishwasher safe and reusable, this liner is your perfect partner for everyday air frying convenience.
